vocab.meaning: sự tích hợp công nghệ (vào giảng dạy)
vocab.example: The most striking difference is the level of technological integration, with tablets and VR headsets becoming standard classroom tools.

vocab.meaning: khuôn viên trường rộng lớn (mở rộng về diện tích)
vocab.example: What used to be a cramped plot of land has evolved into a sprawling campus with multiple specialized wings for arts and sciences.

vocab.meaning: sự đổi mới về phương pháp sư phạm
vocab.example: There's been a wave of pedagogical innovation, moving away from teacher-led monologues toward project-based learning.

vocab.meaning: các tiện nghi giải trí/vui chơi
vocab.example: The school has upgraded its recreational amenities, replacing the old gravel pitch with an all-weather synthetic turf.

vocab.meaning: sự hiện đại hóa về kiến trúc
vocab.example: The architectural modernization of the main building has introduced plenty of glass and natural light, creating a much more inviting atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống quản lý hành chính được tinh giản/tối ưu hóa
vocab.example: Everything from attendance to grading is now handled through a streamlined administrative system, cutting out the old paper trails.

vocab.meaning: các lộ trình học thuật đa dạng
vocab.example: Unlike the rigid 'one-size-fits-all' curriculum of the past, the school now offers diverse academic pathways tailored to individual talents.

vocab.meaning: thư viện được đầu tư kỹ lưỡng/có nguồn lực dồi dào
vocab.example: The tiny book room I remember has been replaced by a well-endowed library featuring vast digital archives and private study pods.

vocab.meaning: tinh thần/triết lý đề cao sự hợp tác
vocab.example: The school culture has shifted toward a collaborative ethos, where peer-to-peer tutoring is actively encouraged by the staff.

vocab.meaning: các quy trình/nghị định thư về sức khỏe nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: In light of recent global events, the school has implemented stringent health protocols and improved sanitation stations throughout the premises.
